news.title:
Britannia Industries appoints Mr. Rakshit Hargave as CEO & MD for a 5-year term (Dec 2025-Dec 2030).
Mr. Hargave, an industry veteran, has held leadership roles at Aditya Birla, NIVEA, Jubilant FoodWorks, Nestle, and Tata Motors.
news.summary:
Britannia Industries appoints Mr. Rakshit Hargave as CEO & MD for a 5-year term (Dec 2025-Dec 2030).
Mr. Hargave, an industry veteran, has held leadership roles at Aditya Birla, NIVEA, Jubilant FoodWorks, Nestle, and Tata Motors.

news.title:
Britannia Industries assures no disruption in operations due to industrial gas concerns, with adequate goods supply.
Antique rates Britannia 'Buy' with ₹7,000 target, citing premiumisation, category scaling, and stable raw material prices.
news.summary:
Britannia Industries assures no disruption in operations due to industrial gas concerns, with adequate goods supply.
Antique rates Britannia 'Buy' with ₹7,000 target, citing premiumisation, category scaling, and stable raw material prices.

news.title:
Britannia states operations unaffected by industrial gas issues, ample finished goods ready.
The company has the capability to switch fuels if necessary to maintain production.
news.summary:
Britannia states operations unaffected by industrial gas issues, ample finished goods ready.
The company has the capability to switch fuels if necessary to maintain production.

news.title:
Britannia Industries confirms no major mfg disruption due to West Asia gas supply concerns.
The company assures sufficient finished goods inventory amid market rumours.
news.summary:
Britannia Industries confirms no major mfg disruption due to West Asia gas supply concerns.
The company assures sufficient finished goods inventory amid market rumours.

news.title:
Britannia Industries gets ₹6.37 cr GST demand notice for FY 2020-24.
Notice cites incorrect goods classification as reason for tax issue.
news.summary:
Britannia Industries gets ₹6.37 cr GST demand notice for FY 2020-24.
Notice cites incorrect goods classification as reason for tax issue.

news.title:
Britannia faces Rs. 6.37 crore tax demand and penalty by CGST for FY 2020-24.
Company claims no material impact and plans to pursue legal remedies.
news.summary:
Britannia faces Rs. 6.37 crore tax demand and penalty by CGST for FY 2020-24.
Company claims no material impact and plans to pursue legal remedies.

news.title:
Britannia's Dec 2025 net sales rose 8.2% YoY to Rs 4,969.8 crore; net profit surged 16.9% YoY to Rs 679.9 crore.
EBITDA grew 14.6% YoY to Rs 1,039.4 crore; EPS increased to Rs 28.23 from Rs 24.15. Shares gave 26.3% 1-year return.
news.summary:
Britannia's Dec 2025 net sales rose 8.2% YoY to Rs 4,969.8 crore; net profit surged 16.9% YoY to Rs 679.9 crore.
EBITDA grew 14.6% YoY to Rs 1,039.4 crore; EPS increased to Rs 28.23 from Rs 24.15. Shares gave 26.3% 1-year return.

news.title:
Britannia's Q3FY26 revenue rose 9.5% YoY to ₹4,885 crore, aided by GST-led grammage packs.
Focus on adjacencies, e-commerce growth, and brand building aims to counter regional competition and sustain long-term growth.
news.summary:
Britannia's Q3FY26 revenue rose 9.5% YoY to ₹4,885 crore, aided by GST-led grammage packs.
Focus on adjacencies, e-commerce growth, and brand building aims to counter regional competition and sustain long-term growth.

news.title:
Britannia plans acquisitions to diversify its portfolio, focusing on functional foods, sustainability, and digital-first brands.
Q3FY26 profit rose 17% YoY to Rs 680 crore; revenue grew 8.2%. Focus remains on volume-led growth and product innovation.
news.summary:
Britannia plans acquisitions to diversify its portfolio, focusing on functional foods, sustainability, and digital-first brands.
Q3FY26 profit rose 17% YoY to Rs 680 crore; revenue grew 8.2%. Focus remains on volume-led growth and product innovation.

news.title:
Britannia shares rise over 2% as Q3 results meet estimates.
IT stocks like LTIMindtree, Persistent Systems, and TCS decline; market breadth neutral.
news.summary:
Britannia shares rise over 2% as Q3 results meet estimates.
IT stocks like LTIMindtree, Persistent Systems, and TCS decline; market breadth neutral.

news.title:
Britannia Industries reports 9.5% revenue growth in Q3 FY26.
PAT rises 16.9% in the same period, showcasing strong performance.
news.summary:
Britannia Industries reports 9.5% revenue growth in Q3 FY26.
PAT rises 16.9% in the same period, showcasing strong performance.

news.title:
Britannia reports stable commodity prices aiding focus against regional competition.
Sales grew 12% in Nov-Dec, indicating normal business growth, says Britannia.
news.summary:
Britannia reports stable commodity prices aiding focus against regional competition.
Sales grew 12% in Nov-Dec, indicating normal business growth, says Britannia.

news.title: Morgan Stanley keeps 'Equal-weight' rating on Britannia with target price Rs 5,469.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley keeps 'Equal-weight' rating on Britannia with target price Rs 5,469.

news.title:
Britannia's Q3 profit rose 17%, plans startup-like agility and acquisitions.
New MD aims to boost innovation, invest in brands, tackle regional competition.
news.summary:
Britannia's Q3 profit rose 17%, plans startup-like agility and acquisitions.
New MD aims to boost innovation, invest in brands, tackle regional competition.

news.title:
Britannia appoints Puneet Das as Chief Marketing Officer effective Feb 16, 2026.
Siddharth Gupta elevated to VP Marketing from Feb 1, 2026; Board approved changes.
news.summary:
Britannia appoints Puneet Das as Chief Marketing Officer effective Feb 16, 2026.
Siddharth Gupta elevated to VP Marketing from Feb 1, 2026; Board approved changes.

news.title:
Britannia Q3 net profit at ₹682.1 Cr, revenue ₹4,969.8 Cr.
EBITDA ₹980.3 Cr with a margin of 19.7%, surpassing estimates.
news.summary:
Britannia Q3 net profit at ₹682.1 Cr, revenue ₹4,969.8 Cr.

news.title:
Major Q3 results this week include Hindalco, ONGC, Britannia, M&M, and Ashok Leyland.
Other key companies reporting include Titan, IRCTC, Eicher Motors, Pfizer, and Apollo Hospitals.
news.summary:

news.title:
Britannia Industries to host an Investor/Analyst Meet on 11th Feb 2026 at 11 AM IST.
Event covers financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending 31st Dec 2025; materials to be shared online.
news.summary:
Britannia Industries to host an Investor/Analyst Meet on 11th Feb 2026 at 11 AM IST.
Event covers financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending 31st Dec 2025; materials to be shared online.

news.title:
Britannia Industries executed an NSE block trade of ~30,480 shares worth Rs. 17.53 crores.
Each share in the block trade was priced at Rs. 5751.00.
news.summary:
Britannia Industries executed an NSE block trade of ~30,480 shares worth Rs. 17.53 crores.

news.title:
Parle's FY25 revenue rose 8.5% to Rs 15,568.5 cr, while profit fell 39% to Rs 979.5 cr.
Britannia retained its lead in the biscuit market, per the regulatory filing.
news.summary:
Parle's FY25 revenue rose 8.5% to Rs 15,568.5 cr, while profit fell 39% to Rs 979.5 cr.
Britannia retained its lead in the biscuit market, per the regulatory filing.
